items.desc_zh: 受害者大卫·马西亚斯是毒枭“埃尔菲托”的兄弟，目前正在美国等待审判。

items.title_en: Heavy rains and flash floods in Bangladesh leave 51 dead

items.desc_zh: 由于山洪和山体滑坡袭击了该国大部分地区，数千人失去了家园。

items.title_en: Planes sent to tackle wildfires of 'exceptional scale' near Paris
items.title_zh: 飞机被派去扑灭巴黎附近“异常规模”的野火
items.desc_en: It was the first time firefighting planes had been sent up from the normally drier and hotter south of the country to tackle fires in the Paris region.
items.desc_zh: 这是消防飞机首次从通常较为干燥和炎热的南部地区派出前往巴黎地区扑灭火灾。

items.title_en: 10 years of Pokémon Go and the millions still trying to catch 'em all
items.title_zh: 《Pokémon Go》问世 10 周年，数百万人仍在尝试捕捉它们
items.desc_en: Michael Steranka, vice president at the mobile game's owner Scopely, says it has always been about bringing people together.
items.desc_zh: 手机游戏所有者 Scopely 的副总裁迈克尔·斯特兰卡 (Michael Steranka) 表示，这款游戏一直致力于将人们聚集在一起。

items.desc_zh: 一次多个 Tailscale 尾网，无需切换+无需虚拟机

items.title_en: At least 27 killed in Bangkok bar fire, Thai media report
items.title_zh: 泰国媒体报道曼谷酒吧火灾至少27人死亡
items.desc_en: Unverified footage shows flames blasting out of the bar as people flee.
items.desc_zh: 未经证实的视频显示，当人们逃离时，酒吧里熊熊燃烧。

items.title_en: Infantino opens door to 64-team World Cup
items.title_zh: 因凡蒂诺为64队世界杯打开大门
items.desc_en: Plans for a 64-team men's world cup are set to be picked up and assessed in detail after the 2026 tournament with Fifa boss Gianni Infantino saying football needs to be "for the whole world".
items.desc_zh: 64支球队参加的男子世界杯计划将在2026年世界杯结束后进行详细评估，国际足联主席詹尼·因凡蒂诺表示，足球需要“为全世界服务”。

items.title_en: South Africa says more than 53,000 foreigners deported in migration campaign
items.title_zh: 南非称超过53,000名外国人在移民运动中被驱逐出境
items.desc_en: South Africa is cracking down on undocumented migrants following widespread anti-immigration protests.
items.desc_zh: 在广泛的反移民抗议活动之后，南非正在打击无证移民。

items.title_en: Meta pulls new AI image feature after days of backlash

items.desc_zh: Meta 本周发布了一项人工智能功能，可以让人们改变 Instagram 内容，但很快就引起了反弹。

items.title_en: Is the Assassin's Creed Black Flag remake worth the 13 year wait?

items.desc_en: The BBC's Tom Gerken plays the much-anticipated pirate game which has been remade from the ground up.
items.desc_zh: BBC 的汤姆·格肯 (Tom Gerken) 扮演了这款备受期待的海盗游戏，该游戏已从头开始重制。

items.title_en: Apple sues OpenAI, its employees claiming theft of trade secrets
items.title_zh: 苹果起诉 OpenAI，其员工声称窃取商业机密
items.desc_en: Apple said in a Friday lawsuit that OpenAI’s nascent hardware business is “rotten to its core.”
items.desc_zh: 苹果在周五的诉讼中表示，OpenAI 新兴的硬件业务“已经烂到了核心”。

items.desc_en: Regulators say features such as infinite scroll contribute to "compulsive use" and "unhealthy habits".
items.desc_zh: 监管机构表示，无限滚动等功能会导致“强迫性使用”和“不健康的习惯”。
